```typescriptreact
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    />
                    <button
                      onClick={handlePriceFilter}
                      className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      Apply
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Sort Options */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="sort-by" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Sort By
                  </label>
                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
                    <select
                      id="sort-by"
                      value={sortBy}
                      onChange={(e) => setSortBy(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="name">Name</option>
                      <option value="price">Price</option>
                      <option value="createdAt">Date Added</option>
                    </select>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setSortDir(sortDir === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc')}
                      className="px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      {sortDir === 'asc' ? '↑' : '↓'}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Clear Filters */}
              <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end">
                <button
                  onClick={clearFilters}
                  className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Clear Filters
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Error Display */}
        {error && (
          <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-4 mb-8">
            <div className="flex">
              <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                <svg className="h-5 w-5 text-red-400" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor">
                  <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zM8.707 7.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414L8.586 10l-1.293 1.293a1 1 0 101.414 1.414L10 11.414l1.293 1.293a1 1 0 001.414-1.414L11.414 10l1.293-1.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L10 8.586 8.707 7.293z" clipRule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div className="ml-3">
                <p className="text-sm text-red-800">{error}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Products Grid */}
        {products.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <ShoppingCartIcon className="mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-gray-400" />
            <h3 className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">No products found</h3>
            <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
              Try adjusting your search terms or filters.
            </p>
            <div className="mt-6">
              <button
                onClick={clearFilters}
                className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 border border-transparent shadow-sm text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-white bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              >
                Clear Filters
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 2xl:grid-cols-5 gap-6">
              {products.map((product) => (
                <ProductCard
                  key={product.id}
                  product={product}
                  onViewDetails={() => {}} // Not used anymore, navigation handled in ProductCard
                  onAddToCart={handleAddToCart}
                />
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* Pagination */}
            {renderPagination()}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ProductCatalog;

```

Actually, this will cause infinite loops. Let me fix this by using `useCallback` for `loadProductsForCategory` and simplifying the approach:


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { MagnifyingGlassIcon, FunnelIcon, XMarkIcon, ShoppingCartIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import ProductCard from '../components/catalog/ProductCard';
import { productAPI, ProductResponse, ProductPageResponse } from '../services/productAPI';
import categoryService, { Category } from '../services/categoryService';

const ProductCatalog: React.FC = () => {
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<ProductResponse[]>([]);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('name');
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState('asc');
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(0);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);
  const [totalElements, setTotalElements] = useState(0);
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const [minPrice, setMinPrice] = useState('');
  const [maxPrice, setMaxPrice] = useState('');

  const pageSize = 12;

  const loadCategories = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await categoryService.getPublicCategories();
      setCategories(data);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error loading categories:', err);
    }
  };

  const loadProductsForCategory = useCallback(async (categoryId: number | null) => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      let response;
      if (categoryId) {
        // Get products by category
        response = await productAPI.getByCategory(
          categoryId,
          currentPage,
          pageSize,
          sortBy,
          sortDir
        );
      } else {
        // Get all products
        response = await productAPI.getAll(currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir);
      }

      const data: ProductPageResponse = response.data;
      setProducts(data.content);
      setTotalPages(data.totalPages);
      setTotalElements(data.totalElements);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load products');
      console.error('Error loading products:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir]);

  const loadProducts = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      let response;
      if (searchTerm.trim()) {
        // Search products
        if (selectedCategory) {
          response = await productAPI.searchByCategory(
            selectedCategory,
            searchTerm,
            currentPage,
            pageSize,
            sortBy,
            sortDir
          );
        } else {
          response = await productAPI.search(
            searchTerm,
            currentPage,
            pageSize,
            sortBy,
            sortDir
          );
        }
      } else if (selectedCategory) {
        // Get products by category
        response = await productAPI.getByCategory(
          selectedCategory,
          currentPage,
          pageSize,
          sortBy,
          sortDir
        );
      } else if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
        // Get products by price range
        const min = minPrice ? parseFloat(minPrice) : 0;
        const max = maxPrice ? parseFloat(maxPrice) : 999999;
        response = await productAPI.getByPriceRange(min, max, currentPage, pageSize);
      } else {
        // Get all products
        response = await productAPI.getAll(currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir);
      }

      const data: ProductPageResponse = response.data;
      setProducts(data.content);
      setTotalPages(data.totalPages);
      setTotalElements(data.totalElements);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load products');
      console.error('Error loading products:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, sortBy, sortDir, currentPage, minPrice, maxPrice]);

  // Load categories on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadCategories();
  }, []);

  // Handle URL parameter changes and load products
  useEffect(() => {
    const categoryParam = searchParams.get('category');
    
    if (categoryParam) {
      const categoryId = parseInt(categoryParam);
      setSelectedCategory(categoryId);
      // Load products immediately with the new category
      loadProductsForCategory(categoryId);
    } else {
      setSelectedCategory(null);
      // Load all products
      loadProductsForCategory(null);
    }
  }, [searchParams, loadProductsForCategory]);

  // Load products when other filters change
  useEffect(() => {
    if (selectedCategory !== null) {
      loadProducts();
    }
  }, [searchTerm, sortBy, sortDir, currentPage, minPrice, maxPrice, loadProducts, selectedCategory]);

  const handleSearch = () => {
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProducts();
  };

  const handleCategoryChange = (categoryId: number | null) => {
    setSelectedCategory(categoryId);
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProductsForCategory(categoryId);
  };

  const handlePriceFilter = () => {
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProducts();
  };

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setSearchTerm('');
    setSelectedCategory(null);
    setMinPrice('');
    setMaxPrice('');
    setSortBy('name');
    setSortDir('asc');
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProductsForCategory(null);
  };


  const handleAddToCart = (product: ProductResponse) => {
    // TODO: Implement add to cart functionality in Feature 7
    console.log('Add to cart:', product);
  };

  const renderPagination = () => {
    if (totalPages <= 1) return null;

    const pages = [];
    const startPage = Math.max(0, currentPage - 2);
    const endPage = Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 2);

    for (let i = startPage; i <= endPage; i++) {
      pages.push(
        <button
          key={i}
          onClick={() => setCurrentPage(i)}
          className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md ${
            i === currentPage
              ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
              : 'text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50'
          }`}
        >
          {i + 1}
        </button>
      );
    }

    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-t border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 sm:px-6">
        <div className="flex flex-1 justify-between sm:hidden">
          <button
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === 0}
            className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Previous
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
            className="relative ml-3 inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Next
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="hidden sm:flex sm:flex-1 sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
          <div>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-700">
              Showing <span className="font-medium">{currentPage * pageSize + 1}</span> to{' '}
              <span className="font-medium">
                {Math.min((currentPage + 1) * pageSize, totalElements)}
              </span>{' '}
              of <span className="font-medium">{totalElements}</span> results
            </p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <nav className="isolate inline-flex -space-x-px rounded-md shadow-sm" aria-label="Pagination">
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
                disabled={currentPage === 0}
                className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-l-md px-2 py-2 text-gray-400 ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:z-20 focus:outline-offset-0 disabled:opacity-50"
              >
                Previous
              </button>
              {pages}
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
                disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
                className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-r-md px-2 py-2 text-gray-400 ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:z-20 focus:outline-offset-0 disabled:opacity-50"
              >
                Next
              </button>
            </nav>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  if (loading && products.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-64">
        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-blue-600"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 sm:text-4xl">
            Product Catalog
          </h1>
          <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl mx-auto text-xl text-gray-500 sm:mt-4">
            {selectedCategory 
              ? `Products in ${categories.find(c => c.id === selectedCategory)?.name || 'Selected Category'}`
              : 'Discover our amazing collection of products'
            }
          </p>
          {selectedCategory && (
            <div className="mt-4">
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(null)}
                className="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors duration-200"
              >
                <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                Clear Category Filter
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Search and Filters */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-gray-200 p-6 mb-8">
          <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4">
            {/* Search Bar */}
            <div className="flex-1">
              <div className="relative">
                <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
                  <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                </div>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Search products..."
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSearch()}
                  className="block w-full pl-10 pr-3 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg leading-5 bg-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:placeholder-gray-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                />
                <button
                  onClick={handleSearch}
                  className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 px-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
                >
                  <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                  </svg>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Filter Toggle */}
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowFilters(!showFilters)}
              className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
            >
              <FunnelIcon className="h-5 w-5 mr-2" />
              Filters
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Advanced Filters */}
          {showFilters && (
            <div className="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                {/* Category Filter */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="category-filter" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Category
                  </label>
                  <select
                    id="category-filter"
                    value={selectedCategory || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => handleCategoryChange(e.target.value ? parseInt(e.target.value) : null)}
                    className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                  >
                    <option value="">All Categories</option>
                    {categories.map((category) => (
                      <option key={category.id} value={category.id}>
                        {category.name}
                      </option>
                    ))}
                  </select>
                </div>

                {/* Price Range */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="min-price" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Price Range
                  </label>
                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
                    <input
                      id="min-price"
                      type="number"
                      placeholder="Min"
                      value={minPrice}
                      onChange={(e) => setMinPrice(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    />
                    <input
                      id="max-price"
                      type="number"
                      placeholder="Max"
                      value={maxPrice}
                      onChange={(e) => setMaxPrice(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    />
                    <button
                      onClick={handlePriceFilter}
                      className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      Apply
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Sort Options */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="sort-by" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Sort By
                  </label>
                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
                    <select
                      id="sort-by"
                      value={sortBy}
                      onChange={(e) => setSortBy(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="name">Name</option>
                      <option value="price">Price</option>
                      <option value="createdAt">Date Added</option>
                    </select>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setSortDir(sortDir === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc')}
                      className="px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      {sortDir === 'asc' ? '↑' : '↓'}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Clear Filters */}
              <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end">
                <button
                  onClick={clearFilters}
                  className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Clear Filters
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Error Display */}
        {error && (
          <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-4 mb-8">
            <div className="flex">
              <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                <svg className="h-5 w-5 text-red-400" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor">
                  <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zM8.707 7.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414L8.586 10l-1.293 1.293a1 1 0 101.414 1.414L10 11.414l1.293 1.293a1 1 0 001.414-1.414L11.414 10l1.293-1.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L10 8.586 8.707 7.293z" clipRule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div className="ml-3">
                <p className="text-sm text-red-800">{error}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Products Grid */}
        {products.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <ShoppingCartIcon className="mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-gray-400" />
            <h3 className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">No products found</h3>
            <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
              Try adjusting your search terms or filters.
            </p>
            <div className="mt-6">
              <button
                onClick={clearFilters}
                className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 border border-transparent shadow-sm text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-white bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              >
                Clear Filters
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 2xl:grid-cols-5 gap-6">
              {products.map((product) => (
                <ProductCard
                  key={product.id}
                  product={product}
                  onViewDetails={() => {}} // Not used anymore, navigation handled in ProductCard
                  onAddToCart={handleAddToCart}
                />
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* Pagination */}
            {renderPagination()}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ProductCatalog;

```

Now let me simplify the useEffect logic to avoid the dependency issues:


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { MagnifyingGlassIcon, FunnelIcon, XMarkIcon, ShoppingCartIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import ProductCard from '../components/catalog/ProductCard';
import { productAPI, ProductResponse, ProductPageResponse } from '../services/productAPI';
import categoryService, { Category } from '../services/categoryService';

const ProductCatalog: React.FC = () => {
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<ProductResponse[]>([]);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('name');
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState('asc');
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(0);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);
  const [totalElements, setTotalElements] = useState(0);
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const [minPrice, setMinPrice] = useState('');
  const [maxPrice, setMaxPrice] = useState('');

  const pageSize = 12;

  const loadCategories = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await categoryService.getPublicCategories();
      setCategories(data);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error loading categories:', err);
    }
  };

  const loadProductsForCategory = useCallback(async (categoryId: number | null) => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      let response;
      if (categoryId) {
        // Get products by category
        response = await productAPI.getByCategory(
          categoryId,
          currentPage,
          pageSize,
          sortBy,
          sortDir
        );
      } else {
        // Get all products
        response = await productAPI.getAll(currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir);
      }

      const data: ProductPageResponse = response.data;
      setProducts(data.content);
      setTotalPages(data.totalPages);
      setTotalElements(data.totalElements);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load products');
      console.error('Error loading products:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir]);

  const loadProducts = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      let response;
      if (searchTerm.trim()) {
        // Search products
        if (selectedCategory) {
          response = await productAPI.searchByCategory(
            selectedCategory,
            searchTerm,
            currentPage,
            pageSize,
            sortBy,
            sortDir
          );
        } else {
          response = await productAPI.search(
            searchTerm,
            currentPage,
            pageSize,
            sortBy,
            sortDir
          );
        }
      } else if (selectedCategory) {
        // Get products by category
        response = await productAPI.getByCategory(
          selectedCategory,
          currentPage,
          pageSize,
          sortBy,
          sortDir
        );
      } else if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
        // Get products by price range
        const min = minPrice ? parseFloat(minPrice) : 0;
        const max = maxPrice ? parseFloat(maxPrice) : 999999;
        response = await productAPI.getByPriceRange(min, max, currentPage, pageSize);
      } else {
        // Get all products
        response = await productAPI.getAll(currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir);
      }

      const data: ProductPageResponse = response.data;
      setProducts(data.content);
      setTotalPages(data.totalPages);
      setTotalElements(data.totalElements);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load products');
      console.error('Error loading products:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, sortBy, sortDir, currentPage, minPrice, maxPrice]);

  // Load categories on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadCategories();
  }, []);

  // Handle URL parameter changes
  useEffect(() => {
    const categoryParam = searchParams.get('category');
    
    if (categoryParam) {
      const categoryId = parseInt(categoryParam);
      setSelectedCategory(categoryId);
    } else {
      setSelectedCategory(null);
    }
  }, [searchParams]);

  // Load products when category or other filters change
  useEffect(() => {
    if (selectedCategory !== null) {
      loadProductsForCategory(selectedCategory);
    } else {
      loadProducts();
    }
  }, [selectedCategory, searchTerm, sortBy, sortDir, currentPage, minPrice, maxPrice, loadProducts, loadProductsForCategory]);

  const handleSearch = () => {
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProducts();
  };

  const handleCategoryChange = (categoryId: number | null) => {
    setSelectedCategory(categoryId);
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProductsForCategory(categoryId);
  };

  const handlePriceFilter = () => {
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProducts();
  };

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setSearchTerm('');
    setSelectedCategory(null);
    setMinPrice('');
    setMaxPrice('');
    setSortBy('name');
    setSortDir('asc');
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProductsForCategory(null);
  };


  const handleAddToCart = (product: ProductResponse) => {
    // TODO: Implement add to cart functionality in Feature 7
    console.log('Add to cart:', product);
  };

  const renderPagination = () => {
    if (totalPages <= 1) return null;

    const pages = [];
    const startPage = Math.max(0, currentPage - 2);
    const endPage = Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 2);

    for (let i = startPage; i <= endPage; i++) {
      pages.push(
        <button
          key={i}
          onClick={() => setCurrentPage(i)}
          className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md ${
            i === currentPage
              ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
              : 'text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50'
          }`}
        >
          {i + 1}
        </button>
      );
    }

    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-t border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 sm:px-6">
        <div className="flex flex-1 justify-between sm:hidden">
          <button
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === 0}
            className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Previous
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
            className="relative ml-3 inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Next
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="hidden sm:flex sm:flex-1 sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
          <div>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-700">
              Showing <span className="font-medium">{currentPage * pageSize + 1}</span> to{' '}
              <span className="font-medium">
                {Math.min((currentPage + 1) * pageSize, totalElements)}
              </span>{' '}
              of <span className="font-medium">{totalElements}</span> results
            </p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <nav className="isolate inline-flex -space-x-px rounded-md shadow-sm" aria-label="Pagination">
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
                disabled={currentPage === 0}
                className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-l-md px-2 py-2 text-gray-400 ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:z-20 focus:outline-offset-0 disabled:opacity-50"
              >
                Previous
              </button>
              {pages}
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
                disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
                className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-r-md px-2 py-2 text-gray-400 ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:z-20 focus:outline-offset-0 disabled:opacity-50"
              >
                Next
              </button>
            </nav>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  if (loading && products.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-64">
        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-blue-600"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 sm:text-4xl">
            Product Catalog
          </h1>
          <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl mx-auto text-xl text-gray-500 sm:mt-4">
            {selectedCategory 
              ? `Products in ${categories.find(c => c.id === selectedCategory)?.name || 'Selected Category'}`
              : 'Discover our amazing collection of products'
            }
          </p>
          {selectedCategory && (
            <div className="mt-4">
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(null)}
                className="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors duration-200"
              >
                <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                Clear Category Filter
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Search and Filters */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-gray-200 p-6 mb-8">
          <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4">
            {/* Search Bar */}
            <div className="flex-1">
              <div className="relative">
                <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
                  <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                </div>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Search products..."
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSearch()}
                  className="block w-full pl-10 pr-3 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg leading-5 bg-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:placeholder-gray-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                />
                <button
                  onClick={handleSearch}
                  className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 px-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
                >
                  <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                  </svg>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Filter Toggle */}
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowFilters(!showFilters)}
              className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
            >
              <FunnelIcon className="h-5 w-5 mr-2" />
              Filters
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Advanced Filters */}
          {showFilters && (
            <div className="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                {/* Category Filter */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="category-filter" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Category
                  </label>
                  <select
                    id="category-filter"
                    value={selectedCategory || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => handleCategoryChange(e.target.value ? parseInt(e.target.value) : null)}
                    className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                  >
                    <option value="">All Categories</option>
                    {categories.map((category) => (
                      <option key={category.id} value={category.id}>
                        {category.name}
                      </option>
                    ))}
                  </select>
                </div>

                {/* Price Range */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="min-price" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Price Range
                  </label>
                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
                    <input
                      id="min-price"
                      type="number"
                      placeholder="Min"
                      value={minPrice}
                      onChange={(e) => setMinPrice(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    />
                    <input
                      id="max-price"
                      type="number"
                      placeholder="Max"
                      value={maxPrice}
                      onChange={(e) => setMaxPrice(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    />
                    <button
                      onClick={handlePriceFilter}
                      className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      Apply
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Sort Options */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="sort-by" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Sort By
                  </label>
                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
                    <select
                      id="sort-by"
                      value={sortBy}
                      onChange={(e) => setSortBy(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="name">Name</option>
                      <option value="price">Price</option>
                      <option value="createdAt">Date Added</option>
                    </select>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setSortDir(sortDir === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc')}
                      className="px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      {sortDir === 'asc' ? '↑' : '↓'}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Clear Filters */}
              <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end">
                <button
                  onClick={clearFilters}
                  className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Clear Filters
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Error Display */}
        {error && (
          <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-4 mb-8">
            <div className="flex">
              <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                <svg className="h-5 w-5 text-red-400" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor">
                  <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zM8.707 7.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414L8.586 10l-1.293 1.293a1 1 0 101.414 1.414L10 11.414l1.293 1.293a1 1 0 001.414-1.414L11.414 10l1.293-1.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L10 8.586 8.707 7.293z" clipRule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div className="ml-3">
                <p className="text-sm text-red-800">{error}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Products Grid */}
        {products.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <ShoppingCartIcon className="mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-gray-400" />
            <h3 className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">No products found</h3>
            <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
              Try adjusting your search terms or filters.
            </p>
            <div className="mt-6">
              <button
                onClick={clearFilters}
                className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 border border-transparent shadow-sm text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-white bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              >
                Clear Filters
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 2xl:grid-cols-5 gap-6">
              {products.map((product) => (
                <ProductCard
                  key={product.id}
                  product={product}
                  onViewDetails={() => {}} // Not used anymore, navigation handled in ProductCard
                  onAddToCart={handleAddToCart}
                />
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* Pagination */}
            {renderPagination()}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ProductCatalog;

```

Let me check for linting errors:


Great! Now let me update the todo list to mark the category filtering issue as completed:


Perfect! Now the category filtering should work correctly. Here's what I've fixed:

## **The Problem**
The issue was a race condition between two `useEffect` hooks:
1. One that handled URL parameter changes and updated `selectedCategory` state
2. Another that called `loadProducts()` when `selectedCategory` changed

The problem was that `loadProducts()` was being called before the `selectedCategory` state was properly updated, so it was using the old value.

## **The Solution**
I've restructured the logic to:

1. **Separate URL parameter handling**: One `useEffect` that only handles URL parameters and updates `selectedCategory` state
2. **Direct category loading**: Created `loadProductsForCategory()` function that directly loads products for a specific category
3. **Combined product loading**: One `useEffect` that watches for changes in `selectedCategory` and other filters, then calls the appropriate loading function

## **How it works now**
1. When you click "Browse Products" on a category → URL changes to `/products?category=10`
2. URL parameter `useEffect` detects the change → sets `selectedCategory` to `10`
3. Product loading `useEffect` detects `selectedCategory` change → calls `loadProductsForCategory(10)`
4. `loadProductsForCategory(10)` directly calls the API with category ID `10`
5. Products are filtered and displayed correctly

**Please test this now:**
1. Go to `/categories`
2. Click "Browse Products" on any category
3. You should now see only products from that specific category!

The category filtering should now work perfectly! 🎉

---

**User**

The issue is still there and in my opinion it is because of two API calls, 

1) http://localhost:8080/api/products/public?page=0&size=12&sortBy=name&sortDir=asc

2) http://localhost:8080/api/products/public/category/10?page=0&size=12&sortBy=name&sortDir=asc

So, we need to conditionally call these APIs, when there is no category we should call products/public API but when the category is there in the URL, we should call products/public/category API

---

**Cursor**

You're absolutely right! The issue is that we're making two API calls - one for all products and then another for the specific category. This is causing the race condition where the "all products" call overwrites the category-specific results.

Let me fix this by ensuring we only make one API call based on the URL parameter:


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { MagnifyingGlassIcon, FunnelIcon, XMarkIcon, ShoppingCartIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import ProductCard from '../components/catalog/ProductCard';
import { productAPI, ProductResponse, ProductPageResponse } from '../services/productAPI';
import categoryService, { Category } from '../services/categoryService';

const ProductCatalog: React.FC = () => {
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<ProductResponse[]>([]);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('name');
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState('asc');
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(0);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);
  const [totalElements, setTotalElements] = useState(0);
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const [minPrice, setMinPrice] = useState('');
  const [maxPrice, setMaxPrice] = useState('');

  const pageSize = 12;

  const loadCategories = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await categoryService.getPublicCategories();
      setCategories(data);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error loading categories:', err);
    }
  };

  const loadProductsForCategory = useCallback(async (categoryId: number | null) => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      let response;
      if (categoryId) {
        // Get products by category
        response = await productAPI.getByCategory(
          categoryId,
          currentPage,
          pageSize,
          sortBy,
          sortDir
        );
      } else {
        // Get all products
        response = await productAPI.getAll(currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir);
      }

      const data: ProductPageResponse = response.data;
      setProducts(data.content);
      setTotalPages(data.totalPages);
      setTotalElements(data.totalElements);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load products');
      console.error('Error loading products:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir]);

  const loadProducts = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      let response;
      if (searchTerm.trim()) {
        // Search products
        if (selectedCategory) {
          response = await productAPI.searchByCategory(
            selectedCategory,
            searchTerm,
            currentPage,
            pageSize,
            sortBy,
            sortDir
          );
        } else {
          response = await productAPI.search(
            searchTerm,
            currentPage,
            pageSize,
            sortBy,
            sortDir
          );
        }
      } else if (selectedCategory) {
        // Get products by category
        response = await productAPI.getByCategory(
          selectedCategory,
          currentPage,
          pageSize,
          sortBy,
          sortDir
        );
      } else if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
        // Get products by price range
        const min = minPrice ? parseFloat(minPrice) : 0;
        const max = maxPrice ? parseFloat(maxPrice) : 999999;
        response = await productAPI.getByPriceRange(min, max, currentPage, pageSize);
      } else {
        // Get all products
        response = await productAPI.getAll(currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir);
      }

      const data: ProductPageResponse = response.data;
      setProducts(data.content);
      setTotalPages(data.totalPages);
      setTotalElements(data.totalElements);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load products');
      console.error('Error loading products:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, sortBy, sortDir, currentPage, minPrice, maxPrice]);

  // Load categories on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadCategories();
  }, []);

  // Handle URL parameter changes and load products
  useEffect(() => {
    const categoryParam = searchParams.get('category');
    
    if (categoryParam) {
      const categoryId = parseInt(categoryParam);
      setSelectedCategory(categoryId);
      // Only call category-specific API
      loadProductsForCategory(categoryId);
    } else {
      setSelectedCategory(null);
      // Only call all products API
      loadProducts();
    }
  }, [searchParams, loadProducts, loadProductsForCategory]);

  // Load products when other filters change (but not when URL changes)
  useEffect(() => {
    // Only reload if we're not in the middle of a URL change
    if (selectedCategory !== null && !searchParams.get('category')) {
      loadProductsForCategory(selectedCategory);
    } else if (selectedCategory === null && !searchParams.get('category')) {
      loadProducts();
    }
  }, [searchTerm, sortBy, sortDir, currentPage, minPrice, maxPrice, loadProducts, loadProductsForCategory, selectedCategory, searchParams]);

  const handleSearch = () => {
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProducts();
  };

  const handleCategoryChange = (categoryId: number | null) => {
    setSelectedCategory(categoryId);
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProductsForCategory(categoryId);
  };

  const handlePriceFilter = () => {
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProducts();
  };

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setSearchTerm('');
    setSelectedCategory(null);
    setMinPrice('');
    setMaxPrice('');
    setSortBy('name');
    setSortDir('asc');
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProductsForCategory(null);
  };


  const handleAddToCart = (product: ProductResponse) => {
    // TODO: Implement add to cart functionality in Feature 7
    console.log('Add to cart:', product);
  };

  const renderPagination = () => {
    if (totalPages <= 1) return null;

    const pages = [];
    const startPage = Math.max(0, currentPage - 2);
    const endPage = Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 2);

    for (let i = startPage; i <= endPage; i++) {
      pages.push(
        <button
          key={i}
          onClick={() => setCurrentPage(i)}
          className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md ${
            i === currentPage
              ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
              : 'text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50'
          }`}
        >
          {i + 1}
        </button>
      );
    }

    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-t border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 sm:px-6">
        <div className="flex flex-1 justify-between sm:hidden">
          <button
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === 0}
            className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Previous
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
            className="relative ml-3 inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Next
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="hidden sm:flex sm:flex-1 sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
          <div>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-700">
              Showing <span className="font-medium">{currentPage * pageSize + 1}</span> to{' '}
              <span className="font-medium">
                {Math.min((currentPage + 1) * pageSize, totalElements)}
              </span>{' '}
              of <span className="font-medium">{totalElements}</span> results
            </p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <nav className="isolate inline-flex -space-x-px rounded-md shadow-sm" aria-label="Pagination">
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
                disabled={currentPage === 0}
                className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-l-md px-2 py-2 text-gray-400 ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:z-20 focus:outline-offset-0 disabled:opacity-50"
              >
                Previous
              </button>
              {pages}
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
                disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
                className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-r-md px-2 py-2 text-gray-400 ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:z-20 focus:outline-offset-0 disabled:opacity-50"
              >
                Next
              </button>
            </nav>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  if (loading && products.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-64">
        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-blue-600"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 sm:text-4xl">
            Product Catalog
          </h1>
          <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl mx-auto text-xl text-gray-500 sm:mt-4">
            {selectedCategory 
              ? `Products in ${categories.find(c => c.id === selectedCategory)?.name || 'Selected Category'}`
              : 'Discover our amazing collection of products'
            }
          </p>
          {selectedCategory && (
            <div className="mt-4">
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(null)}
                className="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors duration-200"
              >
                <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                Clear Category Filter
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Search and Filters */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-gray-200 p-6 mb-8">
          <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4">
            {/* Search Bar */}
            <div className="flex-1">
              <div className="relative">
                <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
                  <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                </div>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Search products..."
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSearch()}
                  className="block w-full pl-10 pr-3 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg leading-5 bg-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:placeholder-gray-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                />
                <button
                  onClick={handleSearch}
                  className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 px-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
                >
                  <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                  </svg>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Filter Toggle */}
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowFilters(!showFilters)}
              className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
            >
              <FunnelIcon className="h-5 w-5 mr-2" />
              Filters
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Advanced Filters */}
          {showFilters && (
            <div className="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                {/* Category Filter */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="category-filter" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Category
                  </label>
                  <select
                    id="category-filter"
                    value={selectedCategory || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => handleCategoryChange(e.target.value ? parseInt(e.target.value) : null)}
                    className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                  >
                    <option value="">All Categories</option>
                    {categories.map((category) => (
                      <option key={category.id} value={category.id}>
                        {category.name}
                      </option>
                    ))}
                  </select>
                </div>

                {/* Price Range */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="min-price" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Price Range
                  </label>
                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
                    <input
                      id="min-price"
                      type="number"
                      placeholder="Min"
                      value={minPrice}
                      onChange={(e) => setMinPrice(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    />
                    <input
                      id="max-price"
                      type="number"
                      placeholder="Max"
                      value={maxPrice}
                      onChange={(e) => setMaxPrice(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    />
                    <button
                      onClick={handlePriceFilter}
                      className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      Apply
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Sort Options */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="sort-by" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Sort By
                  </label>
                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
                    <select
                      id="sort-by"
                      value={sortBy}
                      onChange={(e) => setSortBy(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="name">Name</option>
                      <option value="price">Price</option>
                      <option value="createdAt">Date Added</option>
                    </select>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setSortDir(sortDir === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc')}
                      className="px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      {sortDir === 'asc' ? '↑' : '↓'}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Clear Filters */}
              <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end">
                <button
                  onClick={clearFilters}
                  className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  Clear Filters
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Error Display */}
        {error && (
          <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-4 mb-8">
            <div className="flex">
              <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                <svg className="h-5 w-5 text-red-400" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor">
                  <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zM8.707 7.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414L8.586 10l-1.293 1.293a1 1 0 101.414 1.414L10 11.414l1.293 1.293a1 1 0 001.414-1.414L11.414 10l1.293-1.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L10 8.586 8.707 7.293z" clipRule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div className="ml-3">
                <p className="text-sm text-red-800">{error}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Products Grid */}
        {products.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <ShoppingCartIcon className="mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-gray-400" />
            <h3 className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">No products found</h3>
            <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
              Try adjusting your search terms or filters.
            </p>
            <div className="mt-6">
              <button
                onClick={clearFilters}
                className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 border border-transparent shadow-sm text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-white bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              >
                Clear Filters
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 2xl:grid-cols-5 gap-6">
              {products.map((product) => (
                <ProductCard
                  key={product.id}
                  product={product}
                  onViewDetails={() => {}} // Not used anymore, navigation handled in ProductCard
                  onAddToCart={handleAddToCart}
                />
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* Pagination */}
            {renderPagination()}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ProductCatalog;

```

Actually, let me simplify this further. The issue is that we have too many useEffects causing conflicts. Let me create a single, clean approach:


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { MagnifyingGlassIcon, FunnelIcon, XMarkIcon, ShoppingCartIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import ProductCard from '../components/catalog/ProductCard';
import { productAPI, ProductResponse, ProductPageResponse } from '../services/productAPI';
import categoryService, { Category } from '../services/categoryService';

const ProductCatalog: React.FC = () => {
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<ProductResponse[]>([]);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('name');
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState('asc');
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(0);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);
  const [totalElements, setTotalElements] = useState(0);
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const [minPrice, setMinPrice] = useState('');
  const [maxPrice, setMaxPrice] = useState('');

  const pageSize = 12;

  const loadCategories = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await categoryService.getPublicCategories();
      setCategories(data);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error loading categories:', err);
    }
  };

  const loadProductsForCategory = useCallback(async (categoryId: number | null) => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      let response;
      if (categoryId) {
        // Get products by category
        response = await productAPI.getByCategory(
          categoryId,
          currentPage,
          pageSize,
          sortBy,
          sortDir
        );
      } else {
        // Get all products
        response = await productAPI.getAll(currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir);
      }

      const data: ProductPageResponse = response.data;
      setProducts(data.content);
      setTotalPages(data.totalPages);
      setTotalElements(data.totalElements);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load products');
      console.error('Error loading products:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir]);

  const loadProducts = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      let response;
      if (searchTerm.trim()) {
        // Search products
        if (selectedCategory) {
          response = await productAPI.searchByCategory(
            selectedCategory,
            searchTerm,
            currentPage,
            pageSize,
            sortBy,
            sortDir
          );
        } else {
          response = await productAPI.search(
            searchTerm,
            currentPage,
            pageSize,
            sortBy,
            sortDir
          );
        }
      } else if (selectedCategory) {
        // Get products by category
        response = await productAPI.getByCategory(
          selectedCategory,
          currentPage,
          pageSize,
          sortBy,
          sortDir
        );
      } else if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
        // Get products by price range
        const min = minPrice ? parseFloat(minPrice) : 0;
        const max = maxPrice ? parseFloat(maxPrice) : 999999;
        response = await productAPI.getByPriceRange(min, max, currentPage, pageSize);
      } else {
        // Get all products
        response = await productAPI.getAll(currentPage, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir);
      }

      const data: ProductPageResponse = response.data;
      setProducts(data.content);
      setTotalPages(data.totalPages);
      setTotalElements(data.totalElements);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load products');
      console.error('Error loading products:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, sortBy, sortDir, currentPage, minPrice, maxPrice]);

  // Load categories on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadCategories();
  }, []);

  // Load products based on current state
  useEffect(() => {
    const categoryParam = searchParams.get('category');
    
    if (categoryParam) {
      const categoryId = parseInt(categoryParam);
      setSelectedCategory(categoryId);
      // Call category-specific API
      loadProductsForCategory(categoryId);
    } else {
      setSelectedCategory(null);
      // Call all products API
      loadProducts();
    }
  }, [searchParams, loadProducts, loadProductsForCategory]);

  // Load products when filters change (but not when URL changes)
  useEffect(() => {
    // Skip if this is triggered by URL change
    if (searchParams.get('category') !== null) return;
    
    if (selectedCategory !== null) {
      loadProductsForCategory(selectedCategory);
    } else {
      loadProducts();
    }
  }, [searchTerm, sortBy, sortDir, currentPage, minPrice, maxPrice, loadProducts, loadProductsForCategory, selectedCategory, searchParams]);

  const handleSearch = () => {
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProducts();
  };

  const handleCategoryChange = (categoryId: number | null) => {
    setSelectedCategory(categoryId);
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProductsForCategory(categoryId);
  };

  const handlePriceFilter = () => {
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProducts();
  };

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setSearchTerm('');
    setSelectedCategory(null);
    setMinPrice('');
    setMaxPrice('');
    setSortBy('name');
    setSortDir('asc');
    setCurrentPage(0);
    loadProductsForCategory(null);
  };


  const handleAddToCart = (product: ProductResponse) => {
    // TODO: Implement add to cart functionality in Feature 7
    console.log('Add to cart:', product);
  };

  const renderPagination = () => {
    if (totalPages <= 1) return null;

    const pages = [];
    const startPage = Math.max(0, currentPage - 2);
    const endPage = Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 2);

    for (let i = startPage; i <= endPage; i++) {
      pages.push(
        <button
          key={i}
          onClick={() => setCurrentPage(i)}
          className={`px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md ${
            i === currentPage
              ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
              : 'text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50'
          }`}
        >
          {i + 1}
        </button>
      );
    }

    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-t border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 sm:px-6">
        <div className="flex flex-1 justify-between sm:hidden">
          <button
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === 0}
            className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Previous
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
            disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
            className="relative ml-3 inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            Next
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="hidden sm:flex sm:flex-1 sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
          <div>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-700">
              Showing <span className="font-medium">{currentPage * pageSize + 1}</span> to{' '}
              <span className="font-medium">
                {Math.min((currentPage + 1) * pageSize, totalElements)}
              </span>{' '}
              of <span className="font-medium">{totalElements}</span> results
            </p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <nav className="isolate inline-flex -space-x-px rounded-md shadow-sm" aria-label="Pagination">
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(0, currentPage - 1))}
                disabled={currentPage === 0}
                className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-l-md px-2 py-2 text-gray-400 ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:z-20 focus:outline-offset-0 disabled:opacity-50"
              >
                Previous
              </button>
              {pages}
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1))}
                disabled={currentPage === totalPages - 1}
                className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-r-md px-2 py-2 text-gray-400 ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:z-20 focus:outline-offset-0 disabled:opacity-50"
              >
                Next
              </button>
            </nav>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  if (loading && products.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-64">
        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-blue-600"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-8">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 sm:text-4xl">
            Product Catalog
          </h1>
          <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl mx-auto text-xl text-gray-500 sm:mt-4">
            {selectedCategory 
              ? `Products in ${categories.find(c => c.id === selectedCategory)?.name || 'Selected Category'}`
              : 'Discover our amazing collection of products'
            }
          </p>
          {selectedCategory && (
            <div className="mt-4">
              <button
                onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(null)}
                className="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors duration-200"
              >
                <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                Clear Category Filter
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Search and Filters */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-gray-200 p-6 mb-8">
          <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4">
            {/* Search Bar */}
            <div className="flex-1">
              <div className="relative">
                <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
                  <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                </div>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Search products..."
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSearch()}
                  className="block w-full pl-10 pr-3 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg leading-5 bg-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:placeholder-gray-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                />
                <button
                  onClick={handleSearch}
                  className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 px-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
                >
                  <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                  </svg>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Filter Toggle */}
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowFilters(!showFilters)}
              className="inline-flex items-center px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
            >
              <FunnelIcon className="h-5 w-5 mr-2" />
              Filters
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Advanced Filters */}
          {showFilters && (
            <div className="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                {/* Category Filter */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="category-filter" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Category
                  </label>
                  <select
                    id="category-filter"
                    value={selectedCategory || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => handleCategoryChange(e.target.value ? parseInt(e.target.value) : null)}
                    className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                  >
                    <option value="">All Categories</option>
                    {categories.map((category) => (
                      <option key={category.id} value={category.id}>
                        {category.name}
                      </option>
                    ))}
                  </select>
                </div>

                {/* Price Range */}
                <div>
                  <label htmlFor="min-price" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Price Range
                  </label>
                  <div className="flex space-x-2">
                    <input
                      id="min-price"
                      type="number"
                      placeholder="Min"
                      value={minPrice}
                      onChange={(e) => setMinPrice(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                    />
                    <input
                      id="max-price"
                      type="number"
                      placeholder="Max"
                      value={maxPrice}
                      onChange={(e) => setMaxPrice(e.target.value)}
                      className="block w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
```
